reason: Agent chat functionality verified - agent successfully responded to a math question with the correct answer
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with Super Agent interface and sidebar showing three agents including "QA-20260418-191936-hyd5" with idle status
Found and clicked "QA-20260418-191936-hyd5" agent in sidebar - Agent detail page opened, showing the agent name, status "idle", message input field, and empty sessions list
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status confirmed as "idle" in the header

Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message typed into the message input field and sent button clicked; agent status transitioned to "working" and new session "Basic Math Question Session" was created
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Agent processed the message and returned response within 1 second, status returned to "idle"

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot - Agent's response clearly displays "4" with "Worked for 1s" indicator; screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with user message and agent response
